references.title: Best Magnesium Supplements for Sleep 2026: Our Experts Weigh In
The 7 Best Magnesium Supplements of 2026, Tested and Reviewed by a Dietitian
Best Magnesium for Sleep: Top 6 Supplements in 2026

en.commentary: Magnesium is the supplement I get asked about most in 2026, and the reason is simple: it delivers on sleep and muscle recovery for most people who are actually deficient, and a huge share of us are. My verdict after living with these bottles is that the form and the testing decide everything. Thorne Magnesium Bisglycinate wins because it nails both. You get 200 mg of glycinate per scoop, it dissolves clean, and every batch carries NSF Certified for Sport testing, which is the strictest label a consumer can buy. I take it 45 minutes before bed and the drop-off into sleep is noticeably faster within the first week. Pure Encapsulations lands second on the strength of the cleanest, most gut-friendly formula I have tried, a single-ingredient hypoallergenic capsule that suits sensitive stomachs. Momentous Magnesium L-Threonate is the specialist pick: threonate is the one form proven to cross the blood-brain barrier, so I reach for it on weeks when mental fog matters more than muscle soreness, and its NSF certification backs the premium price. For value, Doctor's Best gives you TRAACS chelated magnesium at a price nobody beats, and Nature Made is the USP-verified pharmacy pick you can grab tonight. Two rules I will not bend. First, glycinate over citrate if sleep is your goal, because citrate pulls water into the gut and can send you to the bathroom before it relaxes you. Second, third-party testing is non-negotiable in this category after independent labs flagged heavy metals in some powders. Keep your daily supplemental dose near 350 mg, take it with food, and give it two weeks. Magnesium is the rare supplement where the payoff is real and the downside is tiny.

highlights.title: Thorne earns the top spot because testing is the whole game
highlights.body: In a category where independent labs have flagged heavy metals in popular powders, NSF Certified for Sport testing on every Thorne batch is worth more than any marketing claim. Pair that with 200 mg of well-absorbed bisglycinate per scoop and a clean dissolve, and it is the bottle I recommend to anyone starting from zero. The nightly dose settles me into sleep faster and leaves no morning grogginess.

highlights.title: Glycinate is the form to buy for sleep, full stop
highlights.body: Magnesium glycinate binds the mineral to the amino acid glycine, which itself calms the nervous system, so you get a double benefit at bedtime with a form that stays gentle on the gut. That is why Thorne, Pure Encapsulations, Nature Made, and Doctor's Best all cluster at the top of my list. If your only goal is falling asleep faster and waking less, glycinate is the answer.

highlights.title: Momentous L-Threonate is the one to pay up for when your brain is the problem
highlights.body: Threonate is the single magnesium form with real evidence of crossing the blood-brain barrier, and I feel the difference on high-cognitive-load weeks. It costs more than double the glycinate picks, and it is worth every dollar when mental clarity and deep sleep matter more than muscle recovery. The NSF Certified for Sport seal justifies trusting the premium.

highlights.title: Doctor's Best and Nature Made prove you do not need to overspend
highlights.body: Doctor's Best delivers TRAACS chelated magnesium at roughly a dime a day, and Nature Made carries USP verification you can find in any pharmacy tonight. Both use the well-absorbed glycinate chelate that matters, so the value tier here is genuinely good rather than a compromise. Start here if you want to test whether magnesium works for you before spending more.

highlights.title: Dose it right or it will not work
highlights.body: Keep supplemental magnesium near 350 mg per day, take it with food, and commit to two full weeks before judging results. Most people who say magnesium did nothing either took magnesium oxide, which absorbs poorly, or quit after three nights. Get the form and the consistency right and the sleep and recovery benefits show up reliably.

zh-tw.commentary: 鎂大概是我 2026 年被問最多的保健品，原因很直接，對真正缺鎂的人來說，它在睡眠跟肌肉恢復上是真的有感，而我們多數人其實都缺。我實際吃過這一輪後的結論是，鎂的型態跟第三方檢驗決定一切。Thorne 甘胺酸鎂拿下第一，就是因為這兩件事都做到位。每匙 200 毫克甘胺酸鎂，沖泡乾淨不結塊，而且逐批通過 NSF Certified for Sport，這是消費者買得到最嚴格的認證標章。我習慣睡前 45 分鐘吃，第一週就明顯感覺入睡變快。Pure Encapsulations 排第二，靠的是我試過最乾淨、對腸胃最友善的配方，單一成分低敏膠囊，腸胃敏感的人特別適合。Momentous 蘇糖酸鎂是專門選手，蘇糖酸鎂是目前唯一有證據能穿越血腦屏障的型態，所以遇到腦霧比肌肉痠痛更困擾的那幾週，我會改吃它，NSF 認證也撐得起這個價位。講到 CP 值，Doctor's Best 用 TRAACS 螯合鎂做到沒人比得過的價格，Nature Made 則是通過 USP 驗證、藥局今晚就買得到的主流款。有兩個原則我不會退讓。第一，助眠就選甘胺酸鎂，別選檸檬酸鎂，檸檬酸鎂會把水分拉進腸道，還沒放鬆你可能先跑廁所。第二，這個類目第三方檢驗沒得商量，畢竟獨立實驗室驗出某些粉劑重金屬超標。每日補充量抓在 350 毫克上下，隨餐吃，給它兩週時間。鎂算是少數效果真實、副作用又極小的保健品，值得認真吃。

highlights.title: Thorne 拿第一，因為第三方檢驗才是這個類目的勝負關鍵
highlights.body: 在這個獨立實驗室驗出熱門粉劑重金屬超標的類目裡，Thorne 逐批通過 NSF Certified for Sport 的價值，遠勝任何行銷話術。再加上每匙 200 毫克好吸收的甘胺酸鎂、沖泡乾淨不結塊，這就是我會推薦給零基礎新手的那一罐。睡前一份，入睡明顯變快，隔天起床也不會昏沉。

highlights.title: 助眠就買甘胺酸鎂，這點沒得商量
highlights.body: 甘胺酸鎂把鎂結合在甘胺酸上，而甘胺酸本身就能安撫神經系統，等於睡前給你雙重放鬆，而且這個型態對腸胃很溫和。這就是為什麼 Thorne、Pure Encapsulations、Nature Made、Doctor's Best 全都擠在我榜單前段。如果你的唯一目標就是更快入睡、半夜少醒，甘胺酸鎂就是答案。

highlights.title: 腦力是痛點時，Momentous 蘇糖酸鎂值得多花這筆錢
highlights.body: 蘇糖酸鎂是唯一有實證能穿越血腦屏障的鎂型態，遇到腦力高負荷的那幾週我是真的有感。它的價格是甘胺酸鎂款的兩倍多，但當你需要的是思緒清晰跟深層睡眠，而非肌肉恢復時，這錢花得值。NSF Certified for Sport 認證也讓這個溢價值得信任。

highlights.title: Doctor's Best 跟 Nature Made 證明你不必多花冤枉錢
highlights.body: Doctor's Best 用 TRAACS 螯合鎂做到一天大約幾塊錢的成本，Nature Made 則有 USP 驗證、任何藥局今晚就買得到。兩款用的都是關鍵的好吸收甘胺酸螯合鎂，所以這裡的平價段是真的好用，不是將就。想先測試鎂對自己有沒有效再加碼的人，從這兩款起步剛剛好。

highlights.title: 劑量吃對，它才會有效
highlights.body: 每日補充鎂抓在 350 毫克上下，隨餐吃，然後認真吃滿兩週再下判斷。多數說鎂沒效的人，要嘛吃到吸收率超差的氧化鎂，要嘛才吃三天就放棄。把型態選對、把節奏維持住，睡眠跟恢復的好處就會穩定出現。

en.commentary: Thorne Magnesium Bisglycinate keeps the top spot because it wins on the two things that matter most in a supplement, purity and a form your body can actually use. The formula is stripped to the essentials, 200mg of well-absorbed bisglycinate per scoop, and it carries the third-party testing chops that make it a staple in serious training rooms. If you want the gentlest possible magnesium with a paper trail, this is it. Pure Encapsulations holds second and is the one I recommend for sensitive stomachs, its hypoallergenic capsules are as clean as they come and it is the easiest to tolerate on an empty stomach, which is why it scores highest on digestion. Healthline again named it a best-overall pick in its 2026 update, and I agree with the read. Momentous Magnesium Threonate stays third for the nootropic crowd, the threonate form is the one that crosses into the brain, so it earns its keep if evening focus and sleep quality are your goal rather than muscle recovery. Natural Vitality Calm remains the enjoyable one at fourth, a fizzy citrate drink people genuinely look forward to, which counts for a lot in a supplement you need to take nightly. No ranking changes this week. The glycinate forms continue to own the top of this list because absorption and digestive comfort are what turn a magnesium habit into results.

highlights.title: Thorne is the purity benchmark
highlights.body: A stripped-down bisglycinate with serious third-party testing makes it the default for anyone who wants clean magnesium with a paper trail.

highlights.title: Pure Encapsulations for sensitive stomachs
highlights.body: Hypoallergenic capsules tolerate well on an empty stomach, earning the top digestion score and a repeat best-overall nod from Healthline.

highlights.title: Momentous crosses into the brain
highlights.body: The threonate form targets evening focus and sleep quality, making it the pick when cognition matters more than muscle recovery.

highlights.title: Calm is the one you'll enjoy
highlights.body: A fizzy citrate drink people look forward to nightly, and enjoyment is what keeps a magnesium routine going.

zh-tw.commentary: Thorne Magnesium Bisglycinate 穩坐第一，因為它贏在補充品最重要的兩件事上，純度，還有身體真正能吸收的形式。配方精簡到剩本質，每匙 200mg 好吸收的雙甘胺酸鎂，加上第三方檢測的硬底子，這就是它在正規訓練場所常備的原因。你想要最溫和又有檢驗紀錄的鎂，就是它了。Pure Encapsulations 守第二，也是我會推薦給腸胃敏感的人的那罐，低過敏膠囊乾淨到不行，空腹吃也最好耐受，這就是它在消化這項拿最高分的原因。Healthline 2026 更新又把它選為總體最佳，我認同這個判斷。Momentous Magnesium Threonate 排第三，是給重視腦力那群人的，蘇糖酸鎂這個形式能進到大腦，所以如果你的目標是晚間專注跟睡眠品質而不是肌肉恢復，它就值回票價。Natural Vitality Calm 排第四，是最享受的一款，氣泡檸檬酸鎂飲品是那種你會期待喝的，對一款每晚都得吃的補充品來說這點很加分。這週排名沒動。甘胺酸鎂系列繼續佔據榜首，因為吸收跟腸胃舒適度，才是把吃鎂這個習慣變成實際效果的關鍵。

highlights.title: Thorne 是純度標竿
highlights.body: 精簡的雙甘胺酸鎂加上扎實第三方檢測，是想要乾淨、有檢驗紀錄的人的預設選擇。

highlights.title: 腸胃敏感選 Pure Encapsulations
highlights.body: 低過敏膠囊空腹也好耐受，拿下最高消化分，Healthline 再度選它為總體最佳。

highlights.title: Momentous 能進大腦
highlights.body: 蘇糖酸鎂主打晚間專注與睡眠品質，重視腦力勝過肌肉恢復時的首選。

highlights.title: Calm 是你會享受的那款
highlights.body: 氣泡檸檬酸鎂讓人每晚期待喝，享受感正是維持吃鎂習慣的動力。

references.title: Magnesium Bisglycinate Supplementation in Healthy Adults Reporting Poor Sleep: A Randomized, Placebo-Controlled Trial
references.source: NCBI / Nature and Science of Sleep

en.commentary: My ranking holds this week, and fresh research is exactly why I feel good about the order. A randomized, placebo-controlled trial of 155 adults with poor sleep found that 250 mg of elemental magnesium as bisglycinate produced a significantly greater drop in Insomnia Severity Index scores than placebo over four weeks. That is the cleanest human evidence I have seen for the glycinate form, and it is precisely why Thorne Magnesium Bisglycinate keeps my top spot at a 9.5. Thorne pairs that well-studied form with a purity record I trust, its 9.9 there is the highest on the list, and it stays my first recommendation for anyone chasing better sleep. Pure Encapsulations holds second as the gentlest option I test, its 9.6 digestion score reflecting real-world tolerance for sensitive stomachs. Momentous Magnesium Threonate stays third for the crowd focused on cognition and recovery, and it is worth noting UCLA is launching a study in July 2026 on threonate and glycinate for athlete sleep and performance, so this form has more data coming. Natural Vitality Calm holds fourth as the easy-drinking powder people actually stick with. My value pick is unchanged. Doctor's Best High Absorption at a 9.5 value delivers a well-absorbed chelated form for a fraction of the boutique price. If you want the most evidence-backed choice, start with Thorne. If a sensitive gut is your concern, Pure Encapsulations is the safer bet.

highlights.title: Thorne stays the evidence-backed pick
highlights.body: A new placebo-controlled trial found 250 mg of bisglycinate cut insomnia scores significantly more than placebo over four weeks. That is the cleanest evidence for this form, and it is why Thorne holds first at 9.5.

highlights.title: Pure Encapsulations is the gentlest
highlights.body: At 9.6 digestion, it stays my pick for sensitive stomachs. When gut tolerance is the deciding factor, this is the one I trust to go down easy night after night.

highlights.title: Momentous has more data coming
highlights.body: Its threonate form holds third for cognition and recovery, and UCLA is launching a July 2026 study on threonate and glycinate for athlete sleep and performance. This form's evidence base is about to grow.

highlights.title: Doctor's Best wins on value
highlights.body: At 9.5 value, it delivers a well-absorbed chelated magnesium for a fraction of the boutique price. For a reliable daily dose without the premium spend, this is my budget call.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我的排名不動，而且新研究正好讓我對這個順序更有底。一項 155 名睡眠不佳成人的隨機安慰劑對照試驗發現，250 毫克元素鎂（甘胺酸鎂形式）在四週內把失眠嚴重度指數壓下來的幅度，明顯大於安慰劑組。這是我看過甘胺酸形式最乾淨的人體證據，也正是 Thorne Magnesium Bisglycinate 續坐第一、拿 9.5 的原因。Thorne 把這個研究最扎實的形式，配上我信得過的純度紀錄，純度 9.9 是榜單最高，想改善睡眠的人我第一個推它。Pure Encapsulations 守住第二，是我測過最溫和的一款，消化 9.6 反映的是敏感腸胃在現實中的耐受度。Momentous Magnesium Threonate 排第三，給在意認知跟恢復的族群，值得一提的是 UCLA 在 2026 年 7 月要開一項研究，看 L-蘇糖酸鎂跟甘胺酸鎂對運動員睡眠與表現的影響，所以這個形式後面還有更多數據要來。Natural Vitality Calm 保住第四，是那種好入口、大家真的會一直喝下去的粉劑。CP 值我沒改口，Doctor's Best High Absorption 價值 9.5，用精品價的零頭給你吸收良好的螯合鎂。想要最有證據撐腰的，從 Thorne 開始。腸胃敏感的話，Pure Encapsulations 是更保險的選擇。

highlights.title: Thorne 續坐有證據的首選
highlights.body: 新的安慰劑對照試驗發現，250 毫克甘胺酸鎂在四週內把失眠分數壓得比安慰劑明顯更多。這是這個形式最乾淨的證據，也是 Thorne 守住第一、拿 9.5 的原因。

highlights.title: Pure Encapsulations 最溫和
highlights.body: 消化 9.6，它還是我給敏感腸胃的選擇。當耐受度是決定因素時，這款我信得過，一晚接一晚都好入口。

highlights.title: Momentous 後面還有數據
highlights.body: 它的 L-蘇糖酸鎂形式守住第三，給在意認知跟恢復的人。UCLA 在 2026 年 7 月要開研究，看蘇糖酸鎂跟甘胺酸鎂對運動員睡眠表現的影響，這形式的證據要變多了。

highlights.title: Doctor's Best 贏在 CP 值
highlights.body: 價值 9.5，用精品價的零頭給你吸收良好的螯合鎂。想要每天穩定補一份、又不想花高價，這就是我的預算選擇。

references.title: Best magnesium for sleep in 2026, tested and reviewed by a dietitian
Best Brand of Magnesium Glycinate for Sleep 2026

en.commentary: Thorne Magnesium Bisglycinate stays my number one for the simplest reason that matters: it does one thing cleanly and it is verified. Each serving delivers glycinate-bound magnesium and essentially nothing else, it is NSF Certified for Sport, and Yahoo Health just named it the best overall magnesium for 2026 on the strength of its formulation, price, and third-party testing. If you want a magnesium you can trust for nightly sleep and recovery without decoding a proprietary blend, this is it. The powder also absorbs fast since there is no capsule shell to break down. Pure Encapsulations holds second because it is the gentlest on the gut in this lineup, which is exactly what you want if other magnesium forms have sent you running to the bathroom. Its hypoallergenic, third-party-tested formula is a dietitian favorite for sensitive stomachs. Momentous Magnesium Threonate keeps third as the specialist pick, since L-threonate is the form best studied for crossing into the brain, making it the one I point cognitive-focused buyers toward. On value, Doctor's Best still gives you serious absorption per dollar, and Natural Vitality Calm remains the friendliest format if you actually enjoy a warm bedtime drink. My steady advice: pick your form first. Glycinate for sleep and calm, threonate for cognition, citrate if you also want digestive help, then let purity and testing settle the tie. The top three all clear that bar with room to spare.

highlights.title: Thorne is the trustworthy default
highlights.body: Clean single-ingredient glycinate, NSF Certified for Sport, and named best overall magnesium for 2026 by Yahoo Health on formulation, price, and testing.

highlights.title: Pure Encapsulations for sensitive stomachs
highlights.body: The gentlest on digestion here, hypoallergenic and third-party tested, ideal if other magnesium forms upset your gut.

highlights.title: Momentous Threonate for the brain
highlights.body: L-threonate is the form best studied for reaching the brain, so it is my pick for cognitive-focused buyers.

highlights.title: Choose your form first
highlights.body: Glycinate for sleep and calm, threonate for cognition, citrate for digestion, then let purity and third-party testing break the tie.

zh-tw.commentary: Thorne Magnesium Bisglycinate 這週還是我的第一名，理由很單純也很重要，它把一件事做得乾淨又有驗證。每份就是甘胺酸螯合鎂，其他幾乎不加，還拿到 NSF Certified for Sport 認證，Yahoo Health 剛把它選為 2026 整體最佳鎂，靠的就是配方、價格跟第三方檢測。想要一款晚上助眠、幫身體恢復又能信任、還不用去猜什麼獨家配方的鎂，就是它了。粉末型吸收也快，因為沒有膠囊殼要先分解。Pure Encapsulations 穩坐第二，因為它是這份榜單裡對腸胃最溫和的，如果你吃別的鎂會一直跑廁所，這款就是你要的。它低敏、有第三方檢測，營養師很推薦給腸胃敏感的人。Momentous Magnesium Threonate 續坐第三，是專門型選手，L-蘇糖酸這個型態是研究裡最能進到腦部的，所以想顧腦力的我都推這款。CP 值方面，Doctor's Best 一樣是同樣的錢吸收很有感，Natural Vitality Calm 則是最好入口的型態，如果你本來就愛睡前喝杯溫的，它很對味。我一貫的建議是，先選型態。助眠放鬆選甘胺酸鎂，顧腦力選蘇糖酸鎂，順便想幫消化就選檸檬酸鎂，然後再用純度跟檢測來決勝負。前三名這關都輕鬆過。

highlights.title: Thorne 是最可信賴的預設值
highlights.body: 單一成分甘胺酸鎂很乾淨，有 NSF Certified for Sport，被 Yahoo Health 選為 2026 整體最佳鎂。

highlights.title: Pure Encapsulations 給腸胃敏感的人
highlights.body: 這裡對消化最溫和，低敏且有第三方檢測，吃別的鎂會不舒服的就選它。

highlights.title: Momentous 蘇糖酸鎂顧腦力
highlights.body: L-蘇糖酸是研究裡最能進到腦部的型態，想顧腦力的就推這款。

highlights.title: 先選型態再比純度
highlights.body: 助眠放鬆選甘胺酸鎂，顧腦力選蘇糖酸鎂，想幫消化選檸檬酸鎂，再用純度跟檢測決勝負。
